reviews.review_description: I'm 90 percent sure I was the first player for this game considering I joined a few minutes after that1gamer uploaded the release video. I don't really understand the premise of the game and I've just been wandering the halls trying to find out what I do. I'm sure this game will receive better updates  but for right now, it's kind of bad.

developer_response.body: At that point of the game it was admittedly not very fun, as there was only 1 monster and he was kinda slow. There are 3 now, the map is bigger, and the game is overall much more fun. Also, all of the other players were in a private code when the game released, so that's why you didn't see anyone.

reviews.review_description: This game is fun to do quests in and run from the monsters
Sigma sigma boy sigma boy sigma boy
